rationale: The translation is accurate, natural, and preserves Dan's direct style. The title fix from the previous judge has already been applied ('别和模型结婚' matches the original metaphor). All MDX structure, code blocks, headings, and links are correctly preserved. No further medium/high-priority fixes are needed.

suggestionLog.reason: The original title 'Don't Marry Your Model' uses a marriage metaphor. The current translation '不要绑定你的模型' (Don't bind your model) loses this metaphor. '别和模型结婚' directly translates the metaphor and matches the humorous tone.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
